task: Fill exactly three Korean search queries in the query array for each item. Set query[0] to a sparse lay keyword query: a short list of 2-4 natural terms that a general user might actually type. Use plain everyday wording where possible. Avoid unnatural bureaucratic phrasing, over-structured expert terms, exact document titles, program names, acronyms, and document-type labels unless they are clearly ordinary user vocabulary. Set query[1] to a general-public tip-of-the-tongue natural-language query: the user describes the needed document or situation with more context, but still without necessarily knowing the exact document title, program name, acronym, product name, or official term. Set query[2] to a title-keyword query that preserves the key nouns, target group, official terms, acronyms, program names, and useful document-type words that appear in concat. For query[2], remove list numbers, sequence numbers, bullet numbers, section numbers, publication years, date/month markers, issue numbers, and decorative punctuation that do not help retrieval. Keep numbers only when removing them would break the meaning of a named entity, such as a law/standard name, model name, chemical name, measurement, or official identifier. Generate all queries from concat, using the title as the primary source and the summary only as context when the title is ambiguous. Do not invent facts not supported by concat. Preserve record_id and concat unchanged. Return valid JSON only.

items.concat:
[TITLE] 야간근무자의 수면장애 실태 및 관리방안
[SUMMARY] 이 연구는 야간근무에 종사하는 근로자의 수면장애를 위한 관리방안을 마련하기 위한 연구로서, 수면장애의 관리방안을 마련하기 위한 기초자료로서 수면장애의 실태를 파악하고 분석하는 것을 목표로 한다. The prevalence of mild insomnia was 61,072 in men and 37,165 in women at 2014. The prevalence of moderate insomnia was 10,359 in men and 7,645 in women. The prevalence of severe insomnia was 2,430 in men and 2,024 in women. The prevalence of mild insomnia was 136,889 in men and 69,095 at 2015. The prevalence of moderate insomnia was 19,660 in men and 10,913 in women. The prevalence of severe insomnia was 3,809 in men and 2,261 in women. The prevalence of moderate to severe insomnia was 7.0% (15 out of 214) in the apartment workers, 16.6% (29 out of 295) in the hospital workers, and 12.2% (27 out of 222) in the taxi drivers. The factors associated with sleep disorder differed by group. Depressive symptom and fatigue were found to increase the risk of sleep disturbance in all three groups. Caffeine intake and the number of night work were significant variables in apartment workers, nap during night work was significant variable in hospital workers, and satisfaction with income was significant variable in taxi drivers. In order to manage the sleep disorder of night shift workers, it is needed to understand work contents, working conditions and shift work schedule of night shift workers, and recommend appropriate sleep hygiene accordingly. More research is needed in order to recommend sleep hygiene appropriate for various jobs, occupations, and shift work types.
query: 야간근무 수면장애

items.concat:
[TITLE] 근골격계부담작업 유해요인조사의 실효성 강화방안 연구(2)
[SUMMARY] 현행 근골격계부담작업 유해요인조사 제도의 실효성을 강화하기 위한 연구가 2016-2017년 과제로 계획되어 수행되었다. 2016년에 수행된 1차년도 과제가 제도 개선을 위한 ‘정책방향 제시’에 중점을 두었다면, 2017년 2차년도 과제는 이미 제시된 정책방향 또는 단기적인 제도 개선안에 따라 이행되는 과정을 확인하면서 중장기적 과제의 근거 자료를 마련하는데 중점을 두었다. 중장기 과제는 유해요인조사 결과보고 의무 신설, 조사자 또는 전문기관의 자격기준 신설, 근골격계질환 예방관리프로그램 인정제도 도입이었다. 이 연구의 목적은 근골격계부담작업 유해요인조사 제도 관련 문헌고찰, 부담작업 관련 Data 통계분석, 1차년도 연구자료 검토, 연구용역을 통해 부담작업 보유 사업장 규모 파악, 중장기적 과제의 근거자료 마련, 유해요인조사를 위한 감독매뉴얼 개발을 수행함으로써 유해요인조사의 실효성 강화를 위한 기초자료를 제공하고자 하였다.
query: 근골격계 유해요인조사
사업장에서 근골격계 부담작업 유해요인조사를 제대로 운영하는 방안 자료

items.concat:
[TITLE] 살생물제(biocide) 취급근로자 작업환경 실태 및 건강관리 방안 연구
